source: Kaggle T4 run; transcribed from cell-5 summary. Command in notebooks/m2_harder_tasks_kaggle.py (cell 3).
question: How far are you from where you started?
note: MAGNITUDE question (bucket 0-5). exact ON beats the text-only control (OFF) at every length (+26/+29/+26) but degrades with length (62%->40%) — magnitude is the quantity whose SCALE must extrapolate. within-1 is weakly discriminating here (concentrated distribution); exact is the real signal.
